meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Project Management to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how systematic project management and AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code can transform your student workflow.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't a talent; it's a process. By implementing structured project management, you isolate variables, track state changes, and use AI agents to pinpoint logic errors. Stop guessing and start auditing your codebase with precision tools to transform your chaotic workflow into a professional, predictable development cycle.
content.intro:
The screen is a blur of red error messages, and your coffee has gone cold. You’ve been staring at the same function for three hours, convinced that the code is haunted. This is the 'Beginner’s Purgatory'—that moment every developer faces where the logic simply refuses to cooperate.

But here is the secret the pros won't tell you: debugging isn't about being a genius; it's about being a project manager. When you treat your codebase like a managed product rather than a sandbox, the bugs lose their power. Using Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for surgical execution, you can turn your frustration into a systematic roadmap for success.

steps.title: Define the Scope and Error Boundary
steps.description: Before fixing code, you must isolate the failure. Use project management to document exactly what inputs lead to the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify the most likely module causing the 'undefined' error based on the provided stack trace.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'identify error boundary in src/modules/'

steps.title: Create a Reproducible Test Case
steps.description: If you can't reproduce it, you can't fix it. Create a minimal script that triggers the error consistently.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a minimal reproduction script for the current state-management bug in this codebase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create test case for bug in user-auth flow'

steps.title: Map the Logic Flow
steps.description: Use visualization to understand the data flow. If the logic is too complex to track, it is too complex to debug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a sequence diagram for the current authentication logic to identify where state drift occurs.

steps.title: Implement Surgical Refactoring
steps.description: Apply fixes in isolated increments. Never rewrite the whole file; fix one logic gate at a time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest a refactor for the identified logic gate that improves error handling without introducing regression.

steps.title: Verify and Document the Fix
steps.description: Close the loop. Update your documentation so you never face this specific error again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a post-mortem summary of this bug and add a warning comment to the relevant code block.

pro_tips: Always start debugging by verifying your assumptions; 90% of bugs are caused by the developer assuming the data is in a format it isn't.
Use 'Rubber Ducking' with Claude Code—explain the code line-by-line in the CLI; often, the act of vocalizing the logic reveals the flaw.
Keep a 'Bug Journal'—the act of recording a bug turns it into a data point for your future self to analyze patterns.
If you find yourself stuck for more than 30 minutes, stop coding and switch to architectural planning; code is just the implementation of a plan.
Leverage Antigravity to check for 'code smells'—often, the bug isn't in your logic, but in the poor structure you've inherited.
resources: Debugging Strategies for SaaS Apps: https://blog.ai-builder.dev/debugging-101
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully patched your first major bug, move on to implementing unit tests for every new feature you build to prevent regression.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your development velocity. By mastering these project management habits, you gain the confidence to build anything without fear. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Use visualization to understand the data flow. If the logic is too complex to track, it is too complex to debug.
